ddls:
CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "statefp" INTEGER /* State FIPS code */,
  "countyfp" INTEGER /* County FIPS code */,
  "countyns" TEXT /* County NS (non-standard) code */,
  "affgeoid" TEXT /* AFFGEOID (American FactFinder code) */,
  "geoid" INTEGER /* GEOID (Geographic Identifier) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "lsad" TEXT /* LSAD (Legal/Statistical Area Description) */,
  "aland" INTEGER /* Land area of the county in square meters */,
  "awater" INTEGER /* Water area of the county in square meters */,
  "geometry" TEXT /* Geometric boundary of the county in WKT format */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  "median_income" INTEGER /* Median income of the county */,
  "population_density" INTEGER /* Population density (population per square kilometer) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the county data was updated */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Version of the county data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_counties_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_counties_lsad FOREIGN KEY ("lsad") REFERENCES county_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_counties_statefp FOREIGN KEY ("statefp") REFERENCES states ("statefp")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "statefp" INTEGER /* State FIPS code */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "area" INTEGER /* Total area of the state in square meters */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the state */,
  "governor" TEXT /* Name of the governor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "area" INTEGER /* Total area of the region in square meters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "county_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the county type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the county type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "county_attributes" (
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attribute */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county to which the attribute belongs */,
  "attribute_name" TEXT /* Name of the attribute */,
  "attribute_value" TEXT /* Value of the attribute */,
  "attribute_date" TEXT /* Date when the attribute was recorded */,
  "attribute_source" TEXT /* Source of the attribute data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attribute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_county_attributes_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., GIS analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user role */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date the user logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "map_visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the visualization */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county being visualized */,
  "visualization_date" TEXT /* Date when the visualization was created */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., choropleth, heat map) */,
  "visualization_title" TEXT /* Title of the visualization */,
  "visualization_description" TEXT /* Description of the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_map_visualizations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_map_visualizations_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., shapefile, GeoJSON) */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the data source was updated */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_imports" (
  "import_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data import */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source being imported */,
  "import_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was imported */,
  "import_type" TEXT /* Type of data being imported (e.g., county boundaries, demographic data) */,
  "import_status" TEXT /* Status of the data import (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "import_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the import process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("import_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_imports_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_exports" (
  "export_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data export */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who exported the data */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county being exported */,
  "export_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was exported */,
  "export_type" TEXT /* Type of data being exported (e.g., shapefile, GeoJSON) */,
  "export_status" TEXT /* Status of the data export (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "export_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the export process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("export_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_exports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_exports_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county being versioned */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_type" TEXT /* Type of version (e.g., major, minor) */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in the version */,
  "version_author" TEXT /* Name of the user who created the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version being changed */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., addition, deletion, modification) */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "change_author" TEXT /* Name of the user who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_changes_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id")
)
